notes: Independent foundation owning the FSSC 22000 food safety management certification scheme. Includes FSSC 22000-Quality and increasingly food-defense / food-fraud / cybersecurity components. Members-only / paid.

data.official_name: FSSC 22000 Food Safety Management System Certification Scheme
data.notes: Members-only / paid. ISO 22000 + sector-specific PRPs + additional FSSC requirements.
